flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Lenoir Community College rose 294% between 2006 and 2009 (1.3% → 5.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lenoir Community College fell 100% between 2016 and 2019 (7.6% → 0.0%).
